title: Create scripts/dev-launch.sh — deterministic launch + health poll
description: Create scripts/dev-launch.sh bash script that: (1) runs docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d --build, (2) polls http://localhost:3001/ every 2 seconds (UAT_PROCESS_HEALTH_POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS=2) until HTTP 200 or 60 second timeout (UAT_PROCESS_HEALTH_POLL_SECONDS=60), (3) prints status/error messages, (4) exits 0 on success, 1 on timeout. Include optional port 3001 availability pre-check. Make executable (chmod +x).
notes: This is the canonical reference script; agent reads start_command from dev-environment.json but the script provides the implementation pattern. Bash shebang + set -euo pipefail. Consider companion scripts/dev-stop.sh or document inline.
